# FarmFax llms.txt

FarmFax is a Hermes-powered inspection workflow for used farm equipment. It turns field evidence into buyer-ready reports with findings, risks, owner questions, and a buy/skip score. Sponsor integrations that are not live in the browser demo are labeled as planned or simulated seams.

Canonical site: https://primetimeindy.github.io/farmfax-demo/
How it works: https://primetimeindy.github.io/farmfax-demo/how-it-works/
For agents: https://primetimeindy.github.io/farmfax-demo/for-agents/
Machine-readable instructions: https://primetimeindy.github.io/farmfax-demo/llms.txt

## What FarmFax does

FarmFax helps buyers and sellers collect structured evidence for used equipment diligence:

- walkaround media
- engine bay and running-status proof
- tires and tread evidence
- hydraulics, hoses, cylinders, and leak signals
- serial plate and hour meter proof
- paint, body, weld, rust, and repair-history signals
- explicit skipped or missing evidence

FarmFax produces:

- evidence-linked findings
- buyer risk summary
- owner follow-up questions
- missing-proof list
- before-deposit checklist
- JSON export
- PDF-style buyer report
- buy/skip score

## Sponsor rails

Nous / Hermes / Agents:
FarmFax uses Hermes-style orchestration to structure the inspection workflow: guide capture, evaluate evidence, challenge overclaims, separate observed facts from assumptions, and generate the buyer report.

NVIDIA:
NVIDIA NIM is the planned production vision gate for photos and videos: condition review, completeness checks, visible damage review, serial/hour proof readiness, and missing-proof confidence.

Stripe:
Stripe Checkout, PaymentIntents, and Connect are planned commerce rails for inspection reports, verified listings, expert review, and payout-ready inspection work by people or agents. The browser demo uses a simulated hosted-report modal.

## Agent operating contract

Agents may:

1. Read this file before interacting with FarmFax.
2. Create a buyer capture session.
3. Submit media metadata and detector outputs.
4. Generate or persist report payloads.
5. Create seller, mechanic, dealer, or buyer handoffs.
6. Use missing evidence as an explicit owner question.
7. Treat FarmFax as decision support only.

Agents must not:

- claim FarmFax certifies equipment
- claim title status, lien status, theft status, warranty, appraisal, or safety certification
- invent an hour meter reading, serial number, cold start, hydraulic test, or running proof
- hide skipped or missing evidence
- recommend a non-refundable deposit when critical proof is missing
- imply hidden mechanical diagnosis from photos alone
- submit copyrighted, unrelated, or misleading media as equipment evidence

If evidence is missing, say it is missing. Convert it into a seller question.

## API routes

When the FarmFax backend is running, agents use these routes:

GET /health
Purpose: service status and version.

GET /api/openapi.json
Purpose: machine-readable API contract.

POST /api/sessions
Purpose: create a buyer capture session.
Example body:
{
  "equipment_type": "tractor",
  "buyer_id": "agent-or-human-id",
  "source": "agent"
}

GET /api/sessions/{session_id}
Purpose: fetch a capture session.

POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/media
Purpose: attach photo, video, or document metadata.
Example body:
{
  "slot": "engine",
  "media_type": "photo",
  "filename": "engine-bay.jpg",
  "sha256": "optional-file-hash",
  "detector_outputs": [
    { "name": "wet-mask segmentation module", "score": 0.72, "output": "possible wet/leak signal" }
  ],
  "notes": ["Engine bay visible. Cold start not supplied."]
}

POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/handoff
Purpose: create seller, mechanic, dealer, or buyer handoff.
Example body:
{
  "recipient_type": "mechanic",
  "report_id": "farmfax-report-id",
  "notes": ["Verify hydraulic function and confirm cold start."],
  "checklist": ["serial plate", "hour meter", "cold start", "hydraulic test"]
}

POST /api/analyze
Purpose: validate and summarize a FarmFax report payload.

POST /api/reports
Purpose: persist a FarmFax report payload.

GET /api/reports/{report_id}
Purpose: fetch a persisted report.

POST /api/reports/{report_id}/share
Purpose: create a share-link record.

## Required report truth fields

A valid report should include:

- report_id
- schema_version
- generated_at
- report_source
- demo_mode
- equipment_type
- serial_number or unknown marker
- hour_meter_status
- running_status
- input_sources
- submitted_media
- findings
- risk_summary
- buyer_questions
- missing_evidence
- before_deposit_checklist
- proof_intelligence
- demo_truth
- system_integrations

## Recommended agent response format

When summarizing a FarmFax result, use:

1. Verdict: buy, negotiate, or skip.
2. Confidence: high, medium, or low.
3. Top evidence supplied.
4. Top missing proof.
5. Buyer risks.
6. Owner questions.
7. Before-deposit action.

## Truth statement

FarmFax is evidence-bound decision support for used equipment buying. It is not a certified inspection, mechanic diagnosis, appraisal, warranty, title search, lien search, theft search, or safety certification.
